_about: Durable source of truth for the REWORKS playlist (v2: 2017+ house/garage/acid-family reworks of the 14 pre-2000 originals). Read by the skill scripts run from this research/ dir. Committed with picks/overrides/curator.json + article.md; build artifacts + ../playlist_items.json are gitignored.

playlist.title: Remix Rave — House, Garage & Acid Reworks (2017+)
playlist.description: For each pre-2000 original in the sibling 'Remix Rave — The Originals' playlist, the modern reworks that dragged it into house, UK garage, acid house, deep house and the wider bass family — everything released 2017 or later. Discogs-verified, videos validated. Built with the discogs-playlist skill. Full annotated table (Discogs links + notes) on GitHub: https://github.com/dnk8n/awesome-vibe-coded-playlists/blob/main/playlists/remix-rave/remix-rave.md
